product_title: Skybags Streax | Check-in Trolley Bag, 66 Cm, Medium Hardside Luggage | 8 Wheels, Combination Lock | Polypropylene | Suitcase for Travel | 5 Year International Warranty | Coral
body: Such a pathetic product. I seriously considered taking action against Amazon and Skybags for selling something this substandard and wasting my time. From a reputed brand and a platform of that scale, I expected at least basic quality, not this kind of negligence. The product arrived with 2 holes in it, completely unacceptable. This clearly shows a lack of proper quality checks before dispatch. If this is the standard they are maintaining, it’s disappointing and unacceptable. I returned it immediately. The only saving grace was the quick refund process, which was handled well. But that does not excuse the poor product quality in the first place.

body: Such a pathetic product. I seriously considered taking action against Amazon and Skybags for selling something this substandard and wasting my time. From a reputed brand and a platform of that scale, I expected at least basic quality, not this kind of negligence. The product arrived with 2 holes in it, completely unacceptable. This clearly shows a lack of proper quality checks before dispatch. If this is the standard they are maintaining, it’s disappointing and unacceptable. I returned it immediately. The only saving grace was the quick refund process, which was handled well. But that does not excuse the poor product quality in the first place.

product_title: Skybags Cardiff Polyester 63.5 cms Red Travel Duffle (DFTCAR62ERED) (DFTCAR62RED)
body: The Skybags Cardiff Polyester 63.5 cms Red Travel Duffle (DFTCAR62ERED) is a great blend of style, durability, and practicality, making it an excellent choice for both short trips and extended travel. Design & Build Quality: The first thing that stands out is its vibrant red color, which gives it a bold and modern look. Made from high-quality polyester, the bag feels sturdy and durable, capable of handling regular use without wear and tear. The stitching is strong, and the zippers glide smoothly, adding to the overall premium feel. Storage & Capacity: With a size of 63.5 cm, this duffle offers ample space for clothes, shoes, and travel essentials. It easily accommodates packing for a 3–5 day trip. The main compartment is spacious, and additional pockets help keep smaller items organized. Portability & Comfort: The bag comes with both carry handles and an adjustable shoulder strap, providing flexibility in carrying. Even when fully packed, it remains relatively comfortable to carry. The lightweight design is an added advantage for travelers who want to avoid extra bulk. Durability: Skybags has done a good job ensuring the material can withstand rough handling during travel. Whether you’re using it for road trips, gym sessions, or short vacations, it holds up well over time. Pros: • Eye-catching and stylish design • Spacious interior with good organization • Durable polyester material • Lightweight and easy to carry • Smooth and reliable zippers Cons: • Lacks trolley wheels (not ideal for heavy packing) • Limited external compartments Final Verdict: The Skybags Cardiff Red Travel Duffle is a dependable and stylish option for travelers looking for a spacious yet lightweight bag. It offers great value for money and is especially suitable for short trips, gym use, or weekend getaways. Rating: 4.5/5

Design & Build Quality: The first thing that stands out is its vibrant red color, which gives it a bold and modern look. Made from high-quality polyester, the bag feels sturdy and durable, capable of handling regular use without wear and tear. The stitching is strong, and the zippers glide smoothly, adding to the overall premium feel. Storage & Capacity: With a size of 63.5 cm, this duffle offers ample space for clothes, shoes, and travel essentials. It easily accommodates packing for a 3–5 day trip. The main compartment is spacious, and additional pockets help keep smaller items organized. Portability & Comfort: The bag comes with both carry handles and an adjustable shoulder strap, providing flexibility in carrying. Even when fully packed, it remains relatively comfortable to carry. The lightweight design is an added advantage for travelers who want to avoid extra bulk. Durability: Skybags has done a good job ensuring the material can withstand rough handling during travel. Whether you’re using it for road trips, gym sessions, or short vacations, it holds up well over time. Pros: • Eye-catching and stylish design • Spacious interior with good organization • Durable polyester material • Lightweight and easy to carry • Smooth and reliable zippers Cons: • Lacks trolley wheels (not ideal for heavy packing) • Limited external compartments Final Verdict: The Skybags Cardiff Red Travel Duffle is a dependable and stylish option for travelers looking for a spacious yet lightweight bag. It offers great value for money and is especially suitable for short trips, gym use, or weekend getaways. Rating: 4.5/5

The 8 dual wheels provide effortless 360-degree movement, and the TSA lock gives me total peace of mind for international trips. The scratch-resistant finish actually works, keeping the bags looking premium even after rough handling. If you want a mix of style, security, and durability.

body: Such a pathetic product. I seriously considered taking action against Amazon and Skybags for selling something this substandard and wasting my time. From a reputed brand and a platform of that scale, I expected at least basic quality, not this kind of negligence. The product arrived with 2 holes in it, completely unacceptable. This clearly shows a lack of proper quality checks before dispatch. If this is the standard they are maintaining, it’s disappointing and unacceptable. I returned it immediately. The only saving grace was the quick refund process, which was handled well. But that does not excuse the poor product quality in the first place.

product_title: Skybags Streax | Check-in Trolley Bag, 76 Cm, Large Hardside Luggage | 8 Wheels, Combination Lock | Polypropylene | Suitcase for Travel | 5 Year International Warranty | Coral
body: Such a pathetic product. I seriously considered taking action against Amazon and Skybags for selling something this substandard and wasting my time. From a reputed brand and a platform of that scale, I expected at least basic quality, not this kind of negligence. The product arrived with 2 holes in it, completely unacceptable. This clearly shows a lack of proper quality checks before dispatch. If this is the standard they are maintaining, it’s disappointing and unacceptable. I returned it immediately. The only saving grace was the quick refund process, which was handled well. But that does not excuse the poor product quality in the first place.

product_title: Nasher Miles Mexico Hard-Sided Polycarbonate Check-in Luggage 28 inch | 75cm | 8 Wheels Large Trolley Bag for Travel | Suitcase (Navy Blue White)
body: We bought a medium and a large suitcase from Nasher Miles’ website, and the experience was terrible. The plastic used in the suitcases felt cheap, and the handle on the large suitcase was already broken on the first day—it wouldn’t lock in place. After countless calls to their customer care, we finally managed to return it, but the refund took two weeks, and they still deducted some amount for no reason. As for the medium-sized suitcase, it seemed okay at first, but during its very first trip, the handle lock also broke, just like the large one. Now, fixing it requires replacing the entire handle bar. In comparison, I have 3-4 American Tourister suitcases that have lasted over a decade without any issues. Nasher Miles is just not worth it. Poor quality, bad service, and a waste of money.

body: Works well so far. Been a year.. and I have no complaints. Its tough and looks very good.

product_title: Nasher Miles Springfield Hard-Sided Polypropylene Check-in Luggage 28 inch | 75cm | 8 Wheels Large Trolley Bag for Travel | Suitcase (Cool Mint)
body: The suitcase is spacious, stylish, and overall the build quality is good. However, one of the wheels broke during our travel. On the positive side, the company was very prompt in sending a replacement wheel under warranty, which I really appreciated. That said, I do feel the wheel quality could be improved. I purchased a suitcase from Safari at the same time and both were handled in a similar way during travel, but the wheels on the Safari suitcase seem sturdier compared to Nasher. Overall, Nasher has a better design and build aesthetics, but improving the wheel quality would make it an even better product.

product_title: Nasher Miles Springfield Hard-Sided Polypropylene Check-in Luggage 28 inch | 75cm | 8 Wheels Large Trolley Bag for Travel | Suitcase (Cool Mint)
body: The product quality is so bad that the zipper broke after two trips. I raised complaint to Nasher miles team and the reply was to get it fixed outside at a local shop and share the bill for reimbursement. Such a poor quality product with poorest quality customer support. I would highly recommend go for some reputed brands than companies like this which just live on shark tank fame!

product_title: Nasher Miles Springfield Hard-Sided Polypropylene Check-in Luggage 28 inch | 75cm | 8 Wheels Large Trolley Bag for Travel | Suitcase (Cool Mint)
body: The look is sooo soo good and stylish.. it's spacious on both sides.. Best buy. Value for money. Scratch resistance but you should be a bit careful about scars as the colour is light. It's light weight and durable.

product_title: Nasher Miles Springfield Hard-Sided Polypropylene Check-in Luggage 28 inch | 75cm | 8 Wheels Large Trolley Bag for Travel | Suitcase (Cool Mint)

product_title: Nasher Miles Springfield Hard-Sided Polypropylene Check-in Luggage 28 inch | 75cm | 8 Wheels Large Trolley Bag for Travel | Suitcase (Cool Mint)
body: I was initially impressed by the sleek and stylish look of the Nasher Miles trolley bag. However, my excitement quickly turned to disappointment when I noticed that the handle bracket was broken right out of the box. This is a critical part of the bag, and its poor quality makes the entire product unreliable. While the design is appealing, it’s clear that the quality doesn’t match the appearance. I expected much better durability for the price I paid. A broken handle bracket renders the bag almost unusable, and it’s frustrating to deal with such an issue with a brand that claims to deliver quality products. Unfortunately, I cannot recommend this bag unless Nasher Miles improves their quality control. A good look is pointless if the bag can't hold up to basic use.

product_title: Nasher Miles Springfield Hard-Sided Polypropylene Check-in Luggage 28 inch | 75cm | 8 Wheels Large Trolley Bag for Travel | Suitcase (Cool Mint)
body: Works well so far. Been a year.. and I have no complaints. Its tough and looks very good.

product_title: Nasher Miles Springfield Hard-Sided Polypropylene Check-in Luggage 28 inch | 75cm | 8 Wheels Large Trolley Bag for Travel | Suitcase (Cool Mint)
body: The suitcase is spacious, stylish, and overall the build quality is good. However, one of the wheels broke during our travel.
